news.title:
Titagarh Naval Systems gets In-Principle Approval for shipbuilding expansion; IRFC sanctions Rs 1,000 crore loan to MAHAGENCO.
Aurobindo Pharma reports positive Phase 3 trial results; Deep Industries wins ONGC contract worth Rs 59 crore.
news.summary:
Titagarh Naval Systems gets In-Principle Approval for shipbuilding expansion; IRFC sanctions Rs 1,000 crore loan to MAHAGENCO.
Aurobindo Pharma reports positive Phase 3 trial results; Deep Industries wins ONGC contract worth Rs 59 crore.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks' Q4FY26 revenue rose 19.1% YoY; Godrej Consumer expects double-digit sales growth.
IRFC disbursed Rs. 1,000 Cr loan; Aurobindo reported positive Phase 3 trial results for biosimilar BP11.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's CuraTeQ reports positive Phase 3 results for BP11 biosimilar.
BP11 showed comparability to Xolair; EMA and FDA submissions planned by Q2 2026.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's CuraTeQ reports positive Phase 3 results for BP11 biosimilar.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's Curateq Biologics reported positive Phase 3 results for BP11.
Plans are underway for EMA and FDA filings for BP11 by Q2 2026.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's Curateq Biologics reported positive Phase 3 results for BP11.

news.title:
Nifty Healthcare index dropped below 100-WMA to 13,790, down 8% from its peak due to US tariff concerns.
Sun Pharma faces potential FY28 earnings hit of 5%, while generics like Aurobindo, Cipla see relief but risk policy overhang.
news.summary:
Nifty Healthcare index dropped below 100-WMA to 13,790, down 8% from its peak due to US tariff concerns.
Sun Pharma faces potential FY28 earnings hit of 5%, while generics like Aurobindo, Cipla see relief but risk policy overhang.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma approves share buyback worth ₹800 crore with details on premium.
The company also announced the record date for the buyback.
news.summary:

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma to transfer branded generics to Auropharm Ltd for Rs. 143.2 Cr.
The related-party transaction aims to streamline and boost domestic business growth.
news.summary:

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma sets 17 Apr 2026 as record date for share buyback.
Eligible equity shareholders will be identified for participation in the buyback.

news.title:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.
news.summary:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.

news.title:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.
news.summary:

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma surged 4%, hitting a 52-week high of ₹1,355.5 following news of a potential share buyback.
Analysts expect strong growth with target prices of ₹1,517-₹1,610, citing bullish trends and undervaluation.

news.title:
